idea-plugin.name: Python Watchpoint
idea-plugin.description:
Adds watchpoint support to PyCharm for Python 3.12+: when a watched local variable or object attribute changes value, the debugger pauses automatically at the line that performed the change. Two entry points:
  • Debug with Watchpoint – debug toolbar action; injects watchpoint.py into the new debug session so watch("x"), watch("obj.attr") etc. are available from your code.
  • Add Watchpoint – right-click any variable in the debugger's Variables panel to arm a watchpoint on it from a paused session. The same entry toggles to Remove Watchpoint when the selected variable is already armed, and supports multi-select (mixed selections add to the unwatched ones).
Implementation uses Python 3.12+ sys.monitoring with strict per-code-object local events, so there is zero global overhead until you watch something – even in very large codebases.

action.description: Start debugging with watchpoint support enabled
Pause the debugger whenever the selected variable's value changes
